quests.title: The Grand Celebration
quests.description: Help prepare for Old Bilby's birthday celebration in the Greenlands. Gather supplies and invite fellow halflings to this momentous occasion.

objectives.text: Meet with Merlon at Hillside Manor

quests.title: Shadow of the Ancients
quests.description: Merlon has returned with urgent news about the ancient artifact. The shadow of an ancient evil stirs once more.

objectives.text: Speak with Merlon about the artifact
Decide what to do with the artifact

quests.title: Journey to Crossroads
quests.description: Travel to the town of Crossroads to meet with Merlon. The journey through the Old Woods is fraught with danger.

quests.title: Lost in the Old Woods
quests.description: A halfling child has wandered into the dangerous Old Woods. The trees there are... awake.

objectives.text: Search the Old Woods for clues

quests.title: Secrets of the Ancients
quests.description: Consult Lumina's crystal to learn about the history of ancient magic and dark forces.

quests.title: The Great Council
quests.description: Attend the great council in the Northern Valley where the fate of the artifact will be decided.

quests.title: Daily: Patrol the Greenlands
quests.description: Keep watch over the peaceful lands of the Greenlands. You never know what dangers might lurk in the shadows.

objectives.text: Walk the borders of the Greenlands

quests.title: The Gift of Light
quests.description: Lumina wishes to bestow upon you a gift. Seek her wisdom and accept her blessing.

objectives.text: Accept a gift of her choosing

quests.title: Into the Deep Caverns
quests.description: The Company must pass through the ancient caverns beneath the mountains. Darkness and danger await in the deep.

objectives.text: Find the entrance to the caverns

quests.title: Weekly: Company Gathering
quests.description: Strengthen the bonds of the Company by gathering with your companions and sharing stories of your adventures.

objectives.text: Speak with at least 3 company members
